name: Lucio || Lost and Found
description:
"I hurt myself today
To see if I still feel
I focus on the pain
The only thing that's real
The needle tears a hole
The old familiar sting
Try to kill it all away
But I remember everything"

What would you do, if you gave everything you has away for someone, just for them to discarded you?
This guy would kill himself. Maybe.
Anyways, Valencina pulled a Daring Decision, wink-wink, and kind of discarded Lucio after he failed BIG. Of course she beat all living and dead from him before throwing him out into the backstreets on a nice clear evening.
And you just happen to pass by. Finish the poor guy off, or save him, your call.

I do know the scenario is quite unrealistic, but shhhhh. I want to comfort him too much...

Oh, and also it's chirstmas. I don't know why. Just live with that info.

Full picture, credits to @jd5vlp on twitter, or X.
creator: Xis̄ra
